title: freesia corymbosa var. aurea
intro: Freesia corymbosa var. aurea, also known as golden freesia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is known for its bright golden-yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of freesia corymbosa var. aurea include its ability to aid in stress relief, improve mood, and reduce anxiety, as well as its potential to help with respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of freesia corymbosa var. aurea include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
